sourcePattern: Bill's Mobile showcase pattern adapted for a real estate listing: two-link handoff, campaign kit asset buildout, customer home-buying kit link, newsletter, social, print, and drip sequence.
audience: Denver and Front Range buyers seeking a mountain home within about an hour of the city
Evergreen buyers looking for a cozy cabin with room to expand
Remote workers and creatives who value a studio, guest space, or home office option
Buyers drawn to Evergreen Lake, trails, I-70 access, and mountain views
Agents and buyer lists that respond to updated systems and manageable square footage
positioning: An Evergreen A-frame cabin on one acre with mountain character, updated kitchen finishes, deck living, a negotiable tiny house, and expansion potential.

customerHomeBuyingKit.styleDirection: Fleurish-magazine inspired high-end housing graphics with quiet luxury, editorial typography, large Compass listing photography, and a clear buyer next step.
customerHomeBuyingKit.rule: Do not create a separate web page unless the operator explicitly asks. The campaign kit contains the customer-facing home-buying kit link.

compliance.photoDisclosure: Compass listing notes that all photos have been cleaned up using AI.
compliance.verification: Price, status, availability, buyer compensation, taxes, schools, measurements, and listing terms must be re-verified from the live MLS/Compass listing before publication.

artRoute: Official public Compass listing assets referenced by URL; premium generated artwork not required.
